'''dochangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:leafbearing|leafbearing]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ch-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leafbearing|leafbearing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dochangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochangithi|dochangithi]] || [[word:dochangiji|dochangiji]] || [[word:dochangishi|dochangishi]] || [[word:dochangiki|dochangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochanguthuthu|dochanguthuthu]] || [[word:dochangujuju|dochangujuju]] || [[word:dochangushushu|dochangushushu]] || [[word:dochangukuku|dochangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochanguthu|dochanguthu]] || [[word:dochanguju|dochanguju]] || [[word:dochangushu|dochangushu]] || [[word:dochanguku|dochanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochangufthuf|dochangufthuf]] || [[word:dochangufjuf|dochangufjuf]] || [[word:dochangufshuf|dochangufshuf]] || [[word:dochangufkuf|dochangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochangethe|dochangethe]] || [[word:dochangeje|dochangeje]] || [[word:dochangeshe|dochangeshe]] || [[word:dochangeke|dochangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochangothotho|dochangothotho]] || [[word:dochangojojo|dochangojojo]] || [[word:dochangoshosho|dochangoshosho]] || [[word:dochangokoko|dochangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochangotho|dochangotho]] || [[word:dochangojo|dochangojo]] || [[word:dochangosho|dochangosho]] || [[word:dochangoko|dochangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochangofthof|dochangofthof]] || [[word:dochangofjof|dochangofjof]] || [[word:dochangofshof|dochangofshof]] || [[word:dochangofkof|dochangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochangĂŻfthĂŻf|dochangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dochangĂŻfjĂŻf|dochangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dochangĂŻfshĂŻf|dochangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dochangĂŻfkĂŻf|dochangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dochangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dochangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dochangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dochangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dochangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dochangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dochangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochangĂŻfthĂŻf|dochangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dochangĂŻfjĂŻf|dochangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dochangĂŻfshĂŻf|dochangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dochangĂŻfkĂŻf|dochangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochangĂŻfthĂŻf|dochangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dochangĂŻfjĂŻf|dochangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dochangĂŻfshĂŻf|dochangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dochangĂŻfkĂŻf|dochangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochangĂŠthĂŠ|dochangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dochangĂŠjĂŠ|dochangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dochangĂŠshĂŠ|dochangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dochangĂŠkĂŠ|dochangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochangathatha|dochangathatha]] || [[word:dochangajaja|dochangajaja]] || [[word:dochangashasha|dochangashasha]] || [[word:dochangakaka|dochangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochangatha|dochangatha]] || [[word:dochangaja|dochangaja]] || [[word:dochangasha|dochangasha]] || [[word:dochangaka|dochangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochangafthaf|dochangafthaf]] || [[word:dochangafjaf|dochangafjaf]] || [[word:dochangafshaf|dochangafshaf]] || [[word:dochangafkaf|dochangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dochangasha|dochangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dochangshĂ«sha|dochangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dochangrosha|dochangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dochangmusha|dochangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dochangyasha|dochangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godochangnkshĂ«sha|godochangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godochangnkrosha|godochangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godochangnkmusha|godochangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godochangnkyasha|godochangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dochachangasha|dochachangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dochachangshĂ«sha|dochachangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dochachangrosha|dochachangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dochachangmusha|dochachangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dochachangyasha|dochachangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godochachangnkshĂ«sha|godochachangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godochachangnkrosha|godochachangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godochachangnkmusha|godochachangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godochachangnkyasha|godochachangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dechĂŠngasha|dechĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dechĂŠngshĂ«sha|dechĂŠngshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dechĂŠngrosha|dechĂŠngrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dechĂŠngmusha|dechĂŠngmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dechĂŠngyasha|dechĂŠngyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godechĂŠngnkshĂ«sha|godechĂŠngnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godechĂŠngnkrosha|godechĂŠngnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godechĂŠngnkmusha|godechĂŠngnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godechĂŠngnkyasha|godechĂŠngnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dochfangasha|dochfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dochfangshĂ«sha|dochfangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dochfangrosha|dochfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dochfangmusha|dochfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dochfangyasha|dochfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godochfangnkshĂ«sha|godochfangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godochfangnkrosha|godochfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godochfangnkmusha|godochfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godochfangnkyasha|godochfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
